title.en: It doesn't matter! So what! 별로 상관없어! 그래서 뭐 어쩌라고!

description.en: When you don't care about other people's opinions or minor criticisms! Practice expressing a confident attitude with 별로 상관없어 and 그래서 뭐 어쩌라고.
description.ko: 남의 시선이나 사소한 지적에 연연하지 않고 내 갈 길을 가고 싶을 때! 별로 상관없어와 그래서 뭐 어쩌라고를 사용해 당당한 태도를 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Indifference. Confidence. Defiance. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 오늘 양말을 서로 다른 색으로 신은 거 알아요?
content.translation: John. do you know you're wearing different colored socks today?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 사람들이 보면 이상하게 생각할지도 몰라요.
content.translation: People might think it's strange if they see them.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Who cares? 별로 상관없어요. 이게 요즘 유행하는 스타일이라니까요.
content.translation: Who cares? It doesn't matter much. This is a trendy style these days.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 역시 존은 남의 시선을 전혀 신경 안 쓰는군요.
content.translation: As expected. you don't care about other people's eyes at all. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 방금 존의 표정은 그래서 뭐 어쩌라고 라고 말하는 것 같았어요!
content.translation: Your expression just now seemed to say 'So what!'

content.speaker: John
content.text: 별로 상관없어. This sounds very easygoing.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 나에게 별로 중요하지 않은 일이라서 신경 쓰지 않겠다는 뜻이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It means you won't care because it's not a very important matter to you.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 일상에서 아주 가볍게 쓸 수 있는 리액션이죠.
content.translation: It's a reaction you can use very lightly in daily life.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 별로 상관없어.
content.translation: I don't really care.

content.speaker: John
content.text: And what about 그래서 뭐 어쩌라고. It feels a bit stronger.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 이 표현은 "그래서 뭐? 그게 나랑 무슨 상관이야?"라는 도전적인 느낌이 있어요.
content.translation: Right. This expression has a defiant feeling like 'So what? What does that have to do with me?'

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 친한 친구 사이가 아니라면 조금 무례하게 들릴 수 있으니 주의해서 써야 해요.
content.translation: You should be careful when using it because it can sound a bit rude if you're not close friends.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그래서 뭐 어쩌라고.
content.translation: So what!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine someone tells me I'm too old to start a new hobby like skateboarding.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 그 나이에 스케이트보드를 타는 건 좀 위험하지 않아요?
content.translation: John. isn't it a bit dangerous to ride a skateboard at that age?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 넘어져서 다치기라도 하면 큰일이잖아요.
content.translation: It'll be a big problem if you fall and get hurt.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그래서 뭐 어쩌라고! 내가 즐거우면 그만이죠.
content.translation: So what! It's fine as long as I'm having fun.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그래도 주변 사람들이 존을 보면서 수군거릴 수도 있어요.
content.translation: Still. people around you might whisper while looking at you.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 남들이 뭐라고 하든 별로 상관없어. 전 제 인생을 즐길 거예요!
content.translation: I don't really care what others say. I'm going to enjoy my life!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 역시 존의 당당한 모습이 보기 좋네요!
content.translation: As expected. it's good to see your confident side. John!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Sometimes you just have to ignore the noise and be yourself.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 타인의 시선에 갇히기보다 내 행복을 먼저 생각하는 게 중요해요.
content.translation: Right. It's important to think about your own happiness first rather than being trapped in others' eyes.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 표현들로 여러분의 쿨한 매력을 보여주세요!
content.translation: Show off your cool charm with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "who cares" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 별로 상관없어! Who cares!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그래서 뭐 어쩌라고! So what!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 알 게 뭐야! Who knows!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그게 무슨 상관이야! What does that matter!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내 마음이야! It's my choice!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 남의 말에 휘둘리지 말고 당당한 하루 보내시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a confident day today without being swayed by what others say.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 남의 시선을 너무 의식하지 마세요. (Don't be too conscious of other people's eyes.)
선생님의 지적 덕분에 실수를 고칠 수 있었어요. (I was able to fix the mistake thanks to the teacher's criticism.)
사소한 일에 너무 연연하지 마세요. (Don't be too obsessed with trivial things.)
존은 항상 당당하게 자기 의견을 말해요. (John always speaks his opinion confidently.)
처음 본 사람에게 그렇게 말하는 건 무례해요. (It's rude to talk like that to someone you've met for the first time.)
다른 사람들의 말에 휘둘리지 않는 게 중요해요. (It's important not to be swayed by other people's words.)
